OmniScript.description: OmniScript to capture Water Source Evaluation from operator portal
OmniScript.name: PHOCS Water Source Evaluation

childElements.name: MessageAcknowledgeTextBlock
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 10, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

Thank you. Your application for %BLALicenseType% has been submitted successfully. Application Number: %BLAApplicationId%.

", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dataJSON" : false, "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Acknowledgement
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "nextWidth" : "3", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "ssm" : false, "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "businessEvent" : "", "validationRequired" : true, "pubsub" : false, "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "instructionKey" : "", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "previousWidth" : "0", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "label" : "Acknowledgement", "message" : { }, "wpm" : false, "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "previousLabel" : "Previous", "remoteClass" : "", "businessCategory" : "", "nextLabel" : "Close", "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "ariaLevel" : 2, "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: CANCEL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cancel", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Community Named Page", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%ContextId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : false, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "targetName" : "Prescreening", "showCancelPrompt" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CreateWaterSystem
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Create Water System", "bundle" : "PHOCSPortalCreateWaterSystem", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : null, "condition" : "<>", "field" : "WaterSystemNameText" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: DataMapperExtractWaterSystem
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "DataMapperExtractWaterSystem", "bundle" : "PHOCSWaterSystemAccExtract", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "AccountIdText", "inputParam" : "AccountId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : null, "condition" : "<>", "field" : "AccountIdText" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: AccountIdText
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Water System Id Input", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : "", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Yes", "condition" : "=", "field" : "PhocsDrinkingWaterSystemRadio" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ExistenceQuestion
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

Does the Drinking Water System already exist?

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: PhocsDrinkingWaterSystemRadio
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Yes", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : null, "value" : "No", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RelatedDrinkingWaterSystemsLWC
TextBlock5
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock5", "text" : "

 

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: WaterSystemNameText
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Water System Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "No", "condition" : "=", "field" : "PhocsDrinkingWaterSystemRadio" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Drinking Water System", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : "3", "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Get Login User Contact Account", "bundle" : "DMExtractLogInUserId", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "userId", "inputParam" : "captureId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: PHOCSWaterSourceIntakeInformation
